title: Litosanthes villosa
taxonomy: Litosanthes villosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to Australia and is also known as the 'hairy litosanthes'. The classification of Litosanthes villosa is within the order Lamiales. Litosanthes villosa is further classified into the genus Litosanthes and the family Lamiaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the subfamily Prostrateia.
